nasb.text: So the crowd of people who stood by and heard it were saying that it had thundered; others were saying, “An angel has spoken to Him.”

esv.text: The crowd that stood there and heard it said that it had thundered. Others said, “An angel has spoken to him.”

cnv.text: 站在旁邊的群眾聽見了，就說：“打雷了。”另外有人說：“有天使對他說話。”

ccb.text: 站在那里的人群中有人听见就说：“打雷了！”也有人说：“是天使在跟祂说话。”

csbs.text: 站在那里的众人听见了，就说：“打雷了。”另有人说：“是天使在对他说话。”
